claim: Generalize the specific claim in atom ATOM_S001_01 ("And I'll also talk about how we can actually do this. So, okay, these models,...") to the broader category implied by atom ATOM_S024_01: state the claim as a class-level property of the category, not just the specific case.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker states the claim at one level of specificity in S001. Lifting to S024's framing is a generalization the speaker did not state.
why_potentially_useful: Class-level generalization is a candidate research direction if the specific claim is shown to extend; if it doesn't extend, the boundary itself is a finding.
